channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Trump heads to Texas, where 3 supporters are battling it out in the Senate Republican primary
item.description: President Donald Trump is heading to Texas, his first trip after his State of the Union address. The Republican president plans to talk Friday about his energy and economic policies.

item.title: Deadly shooting in Cuban waters highlights obsessions with counter-revolution as US pressure mounts
The Trump administration is detaining and questioning refugees already admitted to the US
